prose:
Headline result (frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap): 5.2880586 eV

Method-provenance block
• Property: HOMO and LUMO orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans/SCF orbital energies).
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-center integrals, no density fitting).
• Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the supplied O2 geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz); no re-optimization.
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
• Charge 0; multiplicity 3 (triplet); unrestricted Kohn–Sham wavefunction.
• Software/backend: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill.
• Convergence: SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings issued.
• All integrity checks passed (integrity.trustworthy = true).
